rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.061 governs school-based health center communication with primary care physicians. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 38.061. COMMUNICATION WITH PRIMARY CARE PHYSICIAN.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this health-center physician-notification statute.
